title: Prism Performance
description: Adaptive performance optimization mod for Minecraft 1.21 designed to enhance FPS and reduce frame drops.
body:
# 🚀 Prism Performance | Adaptive Optimization for Minecraft 1.21

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/422246e825317432bb3e3d2c75f82841558e7b14.jpeg)

Prism Performance is a client-side optimization mod for Minecraft 1.21 focused on improving frame rate stability and reducing stutter through adaptive performance techniques.

---

## 🧠 Adaptive Performance System

Prism dynamically adjusts multiple in-game systems in response to real-time performance conditions instead of relying on static settings.

- Dynamic Render Distance Scaling  
  Automatically adjusts render distance based on current FPS thresholds.

- Entity Culling  
  Prevents rendering of entities outside the player's view using visibility checks.

- Animation Throttling  
  Reduces update frequency of non-essential animations during low FPS situations.

- Frame Stabilization  
  Helps maintain consistent frame pacing during sudden load spikes.

---

## 📊 Performance Monitoring HUD

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/324f66d5443d61685ce648c57de4fdc7e52ce5bd_0.webp)

An optional in-game overlay provides real-time performance feedback:

- FPS indicator with color states (stable, variable, critical)  
- Frame time monitoring (ms)  
- Memory usage tracking (MB)  
- Customizable layout, colors, and scaling (F7 menu)

---

## 📈 Performance Benchmarks

Testing Environment:
- Minecraft Version: 1.21  
- GPU: GTX 1650  
- CPU: Ryzen 5 3600  
- RAM: 16GB  

Scenario: Survival world, 12 chunk render distance

| Setup | Avg FPS | 1% Low FPS |
|------|--------|-----------|
| Vanilla | 72 FPS | 38 FPS |
| Prism Enabled | 110–120 FPS | 70–80 FPS |

Result: Noticeable FPS improvement and reduced frame drops in this test scenario.

---

## 🔁 Reproducibility

Performance results may vary depending on:
- Hardware configuration  
- Installed mods  
- World complexity and entity count  

All tests were conducted in a controlled single-player environment.

---

## 🛠️ Technical Information

| Feature | Detail |
| :--- | :--- |
| Side | Client-side only |
| Footprint | < 1MB |
| Compatibility | Works with Sodium, Lithium, Iris, FerriteCore, and similar mods |
| Config | Cloth Config supported |

---

## 🎯 Use Cases

- PvP players requiring stable frame timing  
- Exploration and fast world traversal  
- Lower-end systems needing improved performance  
- High-refresh-rate setups aiming for consistent FPS  

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

Prism Performance improves performance in many scenarios but does not guarantee FPS increases on all systems or configurations.

---

✨ Prism Performance - Adaptive FPS Optimization for Minecraft 1.21
